title: Community Garden Update | Posts | Test Host Community

callouts.title: Report entry stays within the shared actions surface
bullets: A single accessible menu opens from the ellipsis trigger instead of scattering report buttons across the page.
The safety-report entry can be reused alongside future actions like correction suggestions or citation requests.
The action remains reachable directly from the content surface in no more than a few clicks.
